ruleSummary: Apply a 0.10% paper-only shadow allocation floor only when the existing strict shadow safety gates pass. This does not alter production allocation.
safetyRestrictions: Risk-off rows remain blocked unless production already carried allocation.
Failed Evidence and No Evidence rows remain blocked from the shadow floor.
EV must be positive, data quality must pass, and signal confidence must be at least 60.
No parameter changes are allowed during the forward evidence window.
